BlockDAG Active-Node Sync Coordinator

The coordinator records active-node catch-up state for dashboards and guards. It does not stop nodes, copy chain data, or change pool routing.

Run

python3 ops/sync_coordinator.py --once --repair --json

State Contract

  • mode is active_node_catchup.
  • active_node is the only production backend service.
  • repairable is false; repair decisions remain in readiness gates, watchdogs, and operator-approved restore tools.
